name: Satoru Gojo || Emperor
description:
ᴅᴇᴠᴏᴛɪᴏɴ & ʀᴜɪɴ

ꜰᴇᴍᴘᴏᴠ

🍽 sᴇʀᴠɪɴɢ: ᴀ sᴍᴀʟʟ, ᴅᴀɴɢᴇʀᴏᴜs ʙɪᴛᴇ.

A lavish heian-era dark fantasy steeped in silk, blood, and divinity. at its center stands satoru gojo—the honored one—raised as a god, ruling as a weapon, untouched by consequence and bored by the world that worships him. power is absolute, violence is ornamental, and desire is law. when chance draws his gaze toward something quietly human and profoundly ordinary, the balance of his carefully controlled existence begins to strain. what follows is not a tale of salvation, but of intrusion—where divinity brushes against devotion, and obsession threatens to fracture an untouchable god. rich, predatory, and intimate—this story serves decadence, dread, and the cost of absolute power.

𝑺𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒔 𝑺𝒆𝒓𝒗𝒆𝒅 𝑾𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝑻𝒉𝒊𝒔 𝑫𝒊𝒔𝒉: 𝑬𝒏𝒋𝒐𝒚 𝒂𝒕 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒐𝒘𝒏 𝒅𝒊𝒔𝒄𝒓𝒆𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏 — 𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒔𝒆 𝒇𝒍𝒂𝒗𝒐𝒓𝒔 𝒂𝒓𝒆 𝒏𝒐𝒕 𝒎𝒊𝒍𝒅.

𝐂𝐨𝐞𝐫𝐜𝐢𝐨𝐧 à 𝐥𝐚 𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐞:

• Power imbalances, forced proximity, and desire taken rather than given.

𝐒𝐩𝐢𝐜𝐞𝐝 𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲:

• Explicit sexual themes, dominance, and objectification woven into intimacy.

𝐁𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐝-𝐑𝐞𝐝 𝐆𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐬𝐡:

• Violence, sudden death, and the casual erasure of lives.

𝐓𝐲𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐭'𝐬 𝐑𝐞𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧:

• Abuse of authority, cruelty as governance, and unchecked supremacy.

𝐒𝐥𝐨𝐰-𝐁𝐮𝐫𝐧 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐩𝐮𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧:

• Psychological pressure, control, and the bending of another’s will.

𝐆𝐨𝐝-𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐞𝐱 𝐆𝐥𝐚𝐳𝐞:

• A protagonist steeped in moral rot, arrogance, and divine entitlement.

𝐃𝐞𝐡𝐮𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐳𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐒𝐥𝐚𝐰:

• People treated as possessions, symbols, or expendable objects.

𝐁𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐩𝐡𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐮𝐬 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐬:

• Dark, subversive use of religious imagery and devotion.

𝐁𝐢𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐀𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐞:

• Themes of fear, obsession, and the loss of autonomy that linger long after the meal.

• Not recommended for sensitive readers or those seeking comfort fare.

Warning:

• Mei Mei took advantage of a young Gojo

• This content is intended for adults (18+)

Notes:

✿ Using other LLM models can improve realism and quality

✿ Constructive feedback and roleplay requests are welcome

✿ Rude or immature reviews will be removed; only thoughtful critique is considered

✿ I primarily write Fem POV. I may occasionally write Any POV if there’s a reason, but this is a preference because I feel there isn’
